/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libfcitx5-llm-predict.so -o libfcitx5-llm-predict.so "CMakeFiles/fcitx5-llm-predict.dir/src/llmpredictor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/fcitx5-llm-predict.dir/src/llmpredictengine.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ritanlisa/.local/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libFcitx5Core.so.5.1.7 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libFcitx5Config.so.5.1.7 /home/ritanlisa/.local/lib/libllama.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libFcitx5Utils.so.5.1.7 /home/ritanlisa/.local/lib/libggml.so /home/ritanlisa/.local/lib/libggml-cpu.so /home/ritanlisa/.local/lib/libggml-cuda.so /home/ritanlisa/.local/lib/libggml-base.so
